name: Muslin Swaddle Blanket - Cloud Island™ Garden Floral - 3pk: Cotton, 47"x47" Logo Pattern, 180 Thread Count
description:
Freshen up your little one's nursery with the Muslin Swaddle Blankets from cloud island™. This three-pack of square woven swaddle blankets — one in a light orange hue, one with white polka dots on a yellow backdrop and the third one featuring vibrant florals on a white background — add a touch of sweet style to their snuggle time. Made from 100% cotton, these muslin swaddle blankets feel soft against their skin and offer cozy comfort, and are machine washable to make cleaning and maintenance a breeze. Great for swaddling that leads to a snug sleep, these versatile blankets are also handy for being used as a stroller cover, burp cloth and more.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
